title: cyclosorus asplenioides
intro: Cyclosorus asplenioides, also known as the Chinese ladder brake or ladder spleenwort, is a type of fern native to East Asia. This plant is traditionally used in medicine due to its various medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Cyclosorus asplenioides include reducing fever, relieving cough and cold symptoms, and treating digestive issues such as diarrhea and constipation. It can be prepared into herbal remedies like infusions, decoctions, and tinctures to extract its medicinal compounds and utilize its health benefits.
